Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IHypAction.ISelectionHypAction

All Superinterfaces:
IHypAction
All Known Implementing Classes:
SelectionHypAction
Enclosing interface:
IHypAction
public static interface IHypAction.ISelectionHypAction extends IHypAction
Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that change the selection information of hypotheses in a sequent.

Possible action types for objects implementing such a hypothesis action are defined in this interface.

See Also:
  • IHypAction

  • Method Details

    • getHyps

      Collection<Predicate> getHyps()
      Returns the set of hypotheses on which the hypothesis action does its job.

      The action is performed on all the hypotheses that are also present in the sequent. The exact description of what is performed can be found in the javadoc for IInternalProverSequent

      Returns:
      the set of hypotheses to change the selection of
